title: Gnosis Training Event
description: The data contract for a single Gnosis training event — one sample in the JSONL feedstock the future Layer 7 SFT stage consumes. Source of truth for the field set + semantics: theo-techno-cosmo/plex/archive/TTCL_v1_0_BREAKDOWN.md:314-359 (Part 2: THE GNOSIS EVENT FORMAT). The spec gives the event *format* but no JSON Schema; this schema is the concretized contract (field names mirror the spec verbatim; types are the nearest faithful interpretation), documented here rather than presented as spec-mandated beyond the spec's own field list. The data-generation consumer (@sovereign/gnosis-training-data) emits events that validate against this schema.

event_id.description: Deterministic v5-style UUID (SHA-1 of namespace + seed:stepIndex:compositeKey). NOT random — required for byte-reproducible JSONL. The spec names the field 'uuid'; the deterministic derivation is a concretization.

wheel_state.description: Per-wheel rotation snapshot when this sample was generated. Keys are wheel names from the registry (A/T/V/X/S for llull-default); values are {offset, key_hash}.

active_slots.description: The theological/technological/cosmological attributes in play, materialized from the step's facet→wheel binding + offsets.

provenance_tokens.description: Tokens linking this sample to the wheel slots that generated it. Concretization: one '<registry>:<wheel>:<offset>' per active facet.

messages.description: System / user / assistant message scaffold. The assistant message is the SFT training target — the deterministic consumer leaves it empty; the response is produced downstream.

constitution_score.description: The 5-criterion constitution verdict for this sample, computed by reusing @sovereign/ttcl scoreSign on a Sign materialized from the step's composite. The 5 criteria + total + passes mirror the spec's field names (tripartite/logic_compress/source_aligned/epistemic/no_rlhf_signal).

label.description: Catalan slot label, sourced from the wheel registry's per-slot `labels[offset]` (the Llull register, theo-techno-cosmo/Wheel/8 wheels and 3 domains.docx) for wheels that carry one (A + the 3 domain wheels Teologia/Kosmologia/Technologia + F + S); null for structured-label wheels (P/T/V/Q/E) pending a richer label shape. Never fabricated.
